reference: My baby is ten months old. She fell backwards on our bed the other night. She landed on her head with her arms and knees supporting her entire body. After twenty-four hours, she had a fever and now she does not want to eat her baby food. I noticed her goose egg was on her soft spot too. Will she be fine?
text: My baby is 10 months old. She fell backwards on our bed the other night. She landed on her head with her arms and knees supporting her entire body. After 24 hours, she had a fever and now she does not want to eat her baby food. I noticed her goose egg was on her soft spot too. Will she be fine?
